title: Craft Enchanted Golden Apples
description: This project brings back the old crafting recipe for craftable enchanted golden apples/op gaps. Surround an apple with 8 gold blocks to craft it!
body:
# Craft Enchanted Golden Apples

This project restores the original Minecraft crafting recipe for Enchanted Golden Apples (also often called Notch/God Apples), which was removed back in version 1.9. Very lightweight, supports all Minecraft 1.21 versions and now also 26.1! ## Crafting Recipe Surround an apple with 8 gold blocks in a crafting table! ![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac4e6a04203baa98964ec272bc28fd7a7bb04656.png) > The recipe will show up in your recipe book after you craft it for the first time. ## Features - No configuration needed, just drop it in and play - Recipe automatically appears in your recipe book after crafting once - Lightweight and performance-friendly ## Installation ### Plugin (Paper, Spigot, Purpur) 1. Download the .jar file 2. Drop it into your server's `/plugins` folder 3. Restart your server ### Datapack (Vanilla/Fabric/Forge) Works on both singleplayer worlds and servers. 1. Download the datapack .zip file 2. Place it in your world's `/datapacks` folder - Singleplayer: `.minecraft/saves/[WorldName]/datapacks` - Server: `[ServerFolder]/[WorldName]/datapacks` 3. Run `/reload` ingame or restart your server 4. Check with `/datapack list` to verify. ## Why does this exist? The goal is to make enchanted golden apples more accessible again in vanilla minecraft - and not purely relying on loot. Great for SMP and survival servers. ## Roadmap - Add support for older versions (1.20.x, 1.19.x, etc.) - Config file for customizing the recipe! - ... --- **Enjoying this project?** Support us by leaving a ❤️ and share it with your friends!
